handoffSections.evidence-boundary: Review material only; not real UX evidence.
handoffSections.approval-checklist-summary: Checklist is readable and separate from authorization.
handoffSections.rollback-or-restore-plan: Restore notes identify source templates and owner.
handoffSections.runner-gate-reminder: Current runner is enough for report-only validation.
handoffSections.manual-decision-placeholder: Human reviewer may choose handoff-ready-for-human-review, needs-rework, or blocked.
handoffSections.non-execution-statement: No authorization or execution approval is granted.
